# Reference

<!-- DO NOT EDIT: This document was generated by Puppet Strings -->

## Table of Contents

### Classes

* [`maxscale`](#maxscale): Installs and configures MariaDB MaxScale.
* [`maxscale::config`](#maxscale--config): Configures MariaDB MaxScale and manages the main configuration file.
* [`maxscale::install`](#maxscale--install): Installs the maxscale package
* [`maxscale::install::apt`](#maxscale--install--apt): adds the repo to the system configuration
* [`maxscale::install::direct`](#maxscale--install--direct): A short summary of the purpose of this class
* [`maxscale::install::yum`](#maxscale--install--yum): this class adds the YumRepo

### Defined types

* [`maxscale::config::listener`](#maxscale--config--listener): Creates a listener section in the MaxScale configuration.
* [`maxscale::config::monitor`](#maxscale--config--monitor): == define: maxscale::config::monitor  creates a monitor in maxscale configuration  === Parameters all parameters named like in the original m
* [`maxscale::config::server`](#maxscale--config--server): == define: maxscale::config::server creates a server in maxscale configuration  === Parameters all parameters named like in the original maxs
* [`maxscale::config::service`](#maxscale--config--service): Creates a service section in the MaxScale configuration.

#####


##### <a name="-maxscale--package_name"></a>`package_name`

Data type: `String`

Name of the MaxScale package to install.

##### <a name="-maxscale--package_version"></a>`package_version`

Data type: `String`

Specific version of the MaxScale package to install.

##### <a name="-maxscale--setup_mariadb_repository"></a>`setup_mariadb_repository`

Data type: `Boolean`

Whether to configure the official MariaDB repository for MaxScale.

##### <a name="-maxscale--service_enable"></a>`service_enable`

Data type: `Boolean`

Whether the MaxScale service should be enabled at boot.

##### <a name="-maxscale--threads"></a>`threads`

Data type: `Variant[Integer, Enum['auto']]`

Number of MaxScale worker threads. Can be an Integer or 'auto'.

##### <a name="-maxscale--auth_connect_timeout"></a>`auth_connect_timeout`

Data type: `String`

Connection timeout (in seconds) for backend MySQL connections.

##### <a name="-maxscale--auth_read_timeout"></a>`auth_read_timeout`

Data type: `String`

Read timeout (in seconds) when fetching authentication data.

##### <a name="-maxscale--auth_write_timeout"></a>`auth_write_timeout`

Data type: `String`

Write timeout (in seconds) when fetching authentication data.

##### <a name="-maxscale--ms_timestamp"></a>`ms_timestamp`

Data type: `Integer`

Enable (1) or disable (0) millisecond precision timestamps in logs.

##### <a name="-maxscale--max_auth_errors_until_block"></a>`max_auth_errors_until_block`

Data type: `Integer`

Number of authentication failures allowed before blocking a host.

##### <a name="-maxscale--syslog"></a>`syslog`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable or disable logging to syslog.

##### <a name="-maxscale--maxlog"></a>`maxlog`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable or disable logging to the MaxScale log file.

##### <a name="-maxscale--log_warning"></a>`log_warning`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable or disable logging of warning-level messages.

##### <a name="-maxscale--log_notice"></a>`log_notice`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable or disable logging of notice-level messages.

##### <a name="-maxscale--log_info"></a>`log_info`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable or disable logging of info-level messages.

##### <a name="-maxscale--log_debug"></a>`log_debug`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable or disable logging of debug-level messages.

##### <a name="-maxscale--log_augmentation"></a>`log_augmentation`

Data type: `Boolean`

Enable or disable log message augmentation.

##### <a name="-maxscale--logdir"></a>`logdir`

Data type: `String`

Directory where MaxScale log files are stored.

##### <a name="-maxscale--datadir"></a>`datadir`

Data type: `String`

Directory where MaxScale data files are stored.

##### <a name="-maxscale--cachedir"></a>`cachedir`

Data type: `String`

Directory where MaxScale cached data is stored.

##### <a name="-maxscale--piddir"></a>`piddir`

Data type: `String`

Directory where the MaxScale PID file is stored.

##### <a name="-maxscale--configdir"></a>`configdir`

Data type: `String`

Directory containing MaxScale configuration files.

##### <a name="-maxscale--configfile"></a>`configfile`

Data type: `String`

Path to the main MaxScale configuration file.

##### <a name="-maxscale--max_user"></a>`max_user`

Data type: `String`

User account under which MaxScale runs.

##### <a name="-maxscale--max_group"></a>`max_group`

Data type: `String`

Group under which MaxScale runs.

##### <a name="-maxscale--repository_base_url"></a>`repository_base_url`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional base URL for the MariaDB repository.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--monitor"></a>`monitor`

Data type: `Optional[Hash]`

Optional hash of monitor resources to create.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--server"></a>`server`

Data type: `Optional[Hash]`

Optional hash of server resources to create.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--service"></a>`service`

Data type: `Optional[Hash]`

Optional hash of service resources to create.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--listener"></a>`listener`

Data type: `Optional[Hash]`

Optional hash of listener resources to create.

Default value: `undef`

## Defined types

### <a name="maxscale--config--listener"></a>`maxscale::config::listener`

== Define: maxscale::config::listener

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `maxscale::config::listener` defined type:

* [`service`](#-maxscale--config--listener--service)
* [`protocol`](#-maxscale--config--listener--protocol)
* [`port`](#-maxscale--config--listener--port)
* [`socket`](#-maxscale--config--listener--socket)
* [`address`](#-maxscale--config--listener--address)
* [`ssl`](#-maxscale--config--listener--ssl)
* [`ssl_key`](#-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_key)
* [`ssl_cert`](#-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_cert)
* [`ssl_ca_cert`](#-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_ca_cert)
* [`ssl_version`](#-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_version)
* [`ssl_cert_verification_depth`](#-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_cert_verification_depth)

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--service"></a>`service`

Data type: `String`

The name of the MaxScale service this listener is associated with.

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--protocol"></a>`protocol`

Data type: `String`

The protocol module to use for this listener (for example, 'MariaDBClient').

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--port"></a>`port`

Data type: `Integer`

The TCP port number on which the listener will accept connections.

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--socket"></a>`socket`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional Unix socket path for the listener.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--address"></a>`address`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional IP address for the listener to bind to.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--ssl"></a>`ssl`

Data type: `Optional[Boolean]`

Optional boolean to enable or disable SSL for the listener.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_key"></a>`ssl_key`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional path to the SSL private key file.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_cert"></a>`ssl_cert`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional path to the SSL certificate file.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_ca_cert"></a>`ssl_ca_cert`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional path to the SSL CA certificate file.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_version"></a>`ssl_version`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional SSL/TLS protocol version to allow.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--listener--ssl_cert_verification_depth"></a>`ssl_cert_verification_depth`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

Optional verification depth for SSL certificate chain validation.

Default value: `undef`

### <a name="maxscale--config--server"></a>`maxscale::config::server`

== define: maxscale::config::server
creates a server in maxscale configuration

=== Parameters
all parameters named like in the original maxscale documentation

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `maxscale::config::server` defined type:

* [`address`](#-maxscale--config--server--address)
* [`port`](#-maxscale--config--server--port)
* [`protocol`](#-maxscale--config--server--protocol)
* [`monitoruser`](#-maxscale--config--server--monitoruser)
* [`monitorpw`](#-maxscale--config--server--monitorpw)

* [`persistmaxtime`](#-maxscale--config--server--persistmaxtime)
* [`serv_weight`](#-maxscale--config--server--serv_weight)

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--server--address"></a>`address`

Data type: `String`



##### <a name="-maxscale--config--server--port"></a>`port`

Data type: `Integer`



Default value: `3306`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--server--protocol"></a>`protocol`

Data type: `String`



Default value: `'MySQLBackend'`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--server--monitoruser"></a>`monitoruser`

Data type: `Optional`



Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--server--monitorpw"></a>`monitorpw`

Data type: `Optional`



Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--server--persistpoolmax"></a>`persistpoolmax`

Data type: `Optional`



Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--server--persistmaxtime"></a>`persistmaxtime`

Data type: `Optional`



Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--server--serv_weight"></a>`serv_weight`

Data type: `Optional`



Default value: `undef`

### <a name="maxscale--config--service"></a>`maxscale::config::service`

== Define: maxscale::config::service

#### Examples

##### 

```puppet
maxscale::config::service { 'rw-service':
  router  => 'readwritesplit',
  servers => 'server1,server2',
}
```

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `maxscale::config::service` defined type:

* [`router`](#-maxscale--config--service--router)
* [`servers`](#-maxscale--config--service--servers)
* [`router_options`](#-maxscale--config--service--router_options)
* [`filters`](#-maxscale--config--service--filters)
* [`user`](#-maxscale--config--service--user)
* [`password`](#-maxscale--config--service--password)
* [`enable_root_user`](#-maxscale--config--service--enable_root_user)
* [`localhost_match_wildcard_host`](#-maxscale--config--service--localhost_match_wildcard_host)
* [`version_string`](#-maxscale--config--service--version_string)
* [`weightby`](#-maxscale--config--service--weightby)
* [`auth_all_servers`](#-maxscale--config--service--auth_all_servers)
* [`strip_db_esc`](#-maxscale--config--service--strip_db_esc)
* [`optimize_wildcard`](#-maxscale--config--service--optimize_wildcard)
* [`retry_on_failure`](#-maxscale--config--service--retry_on_failure)
* [`log_auth_warnings`](#-maxscale--config--service--log_auth_warnings)
* [`connection_timeout`](#-maxscale--config--service--connection_timeout)
* [`max_slave_connections`](#-maxscale--config--service--max_slave_connections)
* [`max_slave_replication_lag`](#-maxscale--config--service--max_slave_replication_lag)
* [`use_sql_variables_in`](#-maxscale--config--service--use_sql_variables_in)

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--router"></a>`router`

Data type: `String`

Router module used by this service (for example, 'readwritesplit').

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--servers"></a>`servers`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Comma-separated list of backend server names.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--router_options"></a>`router_options`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional router-specific options.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--filters"></a>`filters`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional comma-separated list of filters applied to this service.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--user"></a>`user`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional username used for authentication.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--password"></a>`password`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional password used for authentication.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--enable_root_user"></a>`enable_root_user`

Data type: `Integer`

Enable (1) or disable (0) usage of the root user.

Default value: `0`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--localhost_match_wildcard_host"></a>`localhost_match_wildcard_host`

Data type: `Integer`

Enable (1) or disable (0) matching localhost to wildcard hosts.

Default value: `1`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--version_string"></a>`version_string`

Data type: `String`

Version string reported by the service.

Default value: `'MaxScale'`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--weightby"></a>`weightby`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional weighting parameter for backend selection.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--auth_all_servers"></a>`auth_all_servers`

Data type: `Integer`

Enable (1) or disable (0) authentication against all servers.

Default value: `1`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--strip_db_esc"></a>`strip_db_esc`

Data type: `Integer`

Enable (1) or disable (0) stripping database escape characters.

Default value: `1`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--optimize_wildcard"></a>`optimize_wildcard`

Data type: `Integer`

Enable (1) or disable (0) wildcard optimization.

Default value: `1`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--retry_on_failure"></a>`retry_on_failure`

Data type: `Integer`

Enable (1) or disable (0) retry on backend failure.

Default value: `1`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--log_auth_warnings"></a>`log_auth_warnings`

Data type: `Integer`

Enable (1) or disable (0) authentication warning logging.

Default value: `0`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--connection_timeout"></a>`connection_timeout`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

Optional connection timeout in seconds.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--max_slave_connections"></a>`max_slave_connections`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

Optional maximum number of slave connections.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--max_slave_replication_lag"></a>`max_slave_replication_lag`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

Optional maximum allowed slave replication lag.

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-maxscale--config--service--use_sql_variables_in"></a>`use_sql_variables_in`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

Optional SQL variable handling mode.

Default value: `undef`
